name: Light Rain Placeholder
description: Explicit placeholder preset for light-rain conditions before environment-coupling dynamics are modeled.

provenance.notes: This preset is intentionally labeled as a placeholder and should not be read as a calibrated wet-weather model.

assumptionNotes.note: Wetness, visibility, aquaplaning risk, and grip loss remain qualitative placeholders in Phase 1.

provenance.notes: Real wet-weather behavior depends on later environment, tire, and control models.
